reviews: Mudassir delivered our Flutter app ahead of schedule with zero bugs at launch. Clean architecture, great communication throughout — exactly what you want in a freelance dev.
We hired him to build a cross-platform app from scratch. He asked the right questions upfront, kept us updated daily, and the final product exceeded our expectations. Will work with him again.
Solid developer. He understood our USSD integration requirements without much back-and-forth and handled the Android-side native code like a pro. Highly recommend for mobile projects.
